host.title: Server Host
host.description: The IP address the server listens on. Use '127.0.0.1' for local-only access or '0.0.0.0' to allow connections from any network interface.
host.warning: ⚠️ Never expose 0.0.0.0 to the internet without authentication!

port.title: Server Port
port.description: The TCP port for the web interface and REST API. Default is 8088.

bridge_address.title: Bridge Address
bridge_address.description: Internal TCP address for Lifeboat communication (hot-swapping updates). Default: localhost:8089

enabled.title: Enable HTTPS
enabled.description: Enables HTTPS via Let's Encrypt (auto-renewal). Also redirects external HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

domain.title: Domain Name
domain.description: A public resolving domain (e.g. aurago.mydomain.com). Port 80 and 443 must be forwarded to AuraGo.
domain.warning: ⚠️ Let's Encrypt will fail if Port 80 is not reachable from the internet.

email.title: Admin Email
email.description: Required by Let's Encrypt for important expiry notifications.

https_port.title: HTTPS Port
https_port.description: Port for HTTPS traffic. Default: 443. Only change if you use a reverse proxy with port forwarding.

http_port.title: HTTP Port
http_port.description: Port for HTTP redirect to HTTPS. Default: 80. Let's Encrypt requires this to be reachable from the internet.

behind_proxy.title: Behind Reverse Proxy
behind_proxy.description: Trust X-Forwarded-* headers from upstream proxies. Enable when using Nginx, Caddy, or Cloudflare.

provider.title: LLM Provider
provider.description: Select a provider from the provider management. Model, URL and API key are taken from the provider entry.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls randomness in responses. Lower (0.1-0.3) = more deterministic, Higher (0.8-1.2) = more creative. Default: 0.7

use_native_functions.title: Native Function Calling
use_native_functions.description: Uses the LLM's native tool calling capability. Only enable if your model supports this (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini).
use_native_functions.warning: ⚠️ Free-tier models often do NOT support this!

structured_outputs.title: Structured Outputs
structured_outputs.description: Enables strict mode for tool calls with constrained output formats.
structured_outputs.warning: ⚠️ Only for models that support this (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini)!

provider.title: Embeddings Provider
provider.description: Provider for vector embeddings. 'disabled' turns off long-term memory. 'internal' uses the main LLM.

internal_model.title: Internal Model
internal_model.description: Model name when using internal provider for embeddings.

external_url.title: External URL
external_url.description: URL for external embeddings provider (e.g., Ollama at http://localhost:11434/v1)

system_language.title: System Language
system_language.description: Primary language for agent responses and system prompts.

core_personality.title: Core Personality
core_personality.description: Base personality profile affecting tone and communication style.

personality_engine.title: Personality Engine V1
personality_engine.description: Enables mood tracking and micro-traits. Automatically enabled when V2 is active.

personality_engine_v2.title: Personality Engine V2
personality_engine_v2.description: Advanced engine with LLM-based mood analysis and dynamic adaptation.

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls
max_tool_calls.description: Maximum consecutive tool calls per request. Prevents runaway loops. Default: 12

memory_compression_char_limit.title: Memory Compression Limit
memory_compression_char_limit.description: Character threshold for compressing older messages. Default: 50000

core_memory_max_entries.title: Core Memory Max Entries
core_memory_max_entries.description: Maximum number of permanent core facts. 0 = unlimited. Default: 200

allow_shell.title: Allow Shell Execution
allow_shell.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to execute shell commands.
allow_shell.warning: Disable for maximum security in shared environments.

allow_python.title: Allow Python Execution
allow_python.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to execute Python code and skills.

allow_filesystem_write.title: Allow Filesystem Write
allow_filesystem_write.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows write/delete operations on files.

allow_network_requests.title: Allow Network Requests
allow_network_requests.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows HTTP API requests to external services.

allow_remote_shell.title: Allow Remote Shell
allow_remote_shell.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows SSH remote execution on managed devices.

allow_self_update.title: Allow Self Update
allow_self_update.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows the agent to trigger automatic self-updates.

allow_mcp.title: Allow MCP Servers
allow_mcp.description: ⚠️ Danger Zone: Allows connections to external Model Context Protocol servers.
allow_mcp.warning: Only add trusted MCP servers - they can execute arbitrary code!

bot_token.title: Bot Token
bot_token.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Stored securely in vault.

telegram_user_id.title: Authorized User ID
telegram_user_id.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID. The bot will only respond to this user.

bot_token.title: Bot Token
bot_token.description: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

guild_id.title: Server ID (Guild)
guild_id.description: The Discord server ID where the bot operates.

watch_enabled.title: Enable Inbox Watch
watch_enabled.description: Automatically check for new emails and notify the agent.

url.title: Home Assistant URL
url.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance (e.g., http://homeassistant.local:8123)

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Long-lived access token from your HA profile. Stored in vault.

enabled.title: Enable Homepage Tool
enabled.description: Activates the Docker-based web development environment. Requires Docker integration to be enabled.

allow_deploy.title: Allow Deployment
allow_deploy.description: Permits the agent to upload built websites to a remote server via SFTP/SCP.

allow_container_management.title: Allow Container Management
allow_container_management.description: Permits the agent to start, stop, rebuild, and destroy the development container.

deploy_host.title: Deploy Host
deploy_host.description: Hostname or IP of the remote web server for deployment.

deploy_port.title: Deploy Port
deploy_port.description: SSH port of the remote server. Default: 22.

deploy_user.title: Deploy Username
deploy_user.description: SSH username for connecting to the deploy server.

deploy_path.title: Remote Path
deploy_path.description: Absolute path on the remote server where the website files will be uploaded (e.g. /var/www/html).

deploy_method.title: Deploy Method
deploy_method.description: Transfer method: SFTP (default, recommended) or SCP.

webserver_enabled.title: Enable Local Web Server
webserver_enabled.description: Starts a Caddy web server in Docker to preview and host websites locally. Supports automatic HTTPS when a domain is configured.

webserver_port.title: Web Server Port
webserver_port.description: Port for the local Caddy web server. Default: 8080.

webserver_domain.title: Web Server Domain
webserver_domain.description: Optional domain for the local web server. When set, Caddy will automatically provision HTTPS via Let's Encrypt.

workspace_path.title: Workspace Path
workspace_path.description: Local directory path where web projects are stored and mounted into the Docker container.

enabled.title: Enable Netlify Integration
enabled.description: Activates Netlify site management, deployments, environment variables, forms, hooks, and SSL provisioning.

readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
readonly.description: When enabled, the agent can only read Netlify data. All create, update, delete, and deploy operations are blocked.

allow_deploy.title: Allow Deployments
allow_deploy.description: Permits the agent to deploy ZIP archives and roll back deploys on Netlify sites.

allow_site_management.title: Allow Site Management
allow_site_management.description: Permits the agent to create, update, and delete Netlify sites.

allow_env_management.title: Allow Environment Variable Management
allow_env_management.description: Permits the agent to create, update, and delete environment variables on Netlify sites.

default_site_id.title: Default Site ID
default_site_id.description: Optional Netlify site ID used when the agent does not specify one. Found in Site settings → General.

team_slug.title: Team Slug
team_slug.description: Optional Netlify team slug for API calls that require a team context (e.g. creating new sites).

host.title: Docker Host
host.description: Docker daemon address. Leave empty for local socket, or use tcp://host:port for remote.

enabled.title: Enable Budget Tracking
enabled.description: Track API costs and enforce spending limits.

daily_limit_usd.title: Daily Limit (USD)
daily_limit_usd.description: Maximum daily spending in US dollars.

enforcement.title: Enforcement Mode
enforcement.description: Action when budget is exceeded: warn = notification only, partial = limit expensive tools, full = block all requests

max_tool_calls.title: Max Tool Calls (Hard Limit)
max_tool_calls.description: Absolute maximum tool calls before aborting. Overrides agent.max_tool_calls if lower.

llm_timeout_seconds.title: LLM Timeout
llm_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for LLM response before timeout. Default: 180

enabled.title: Enable File Indexing
enabled.description: Automatically index files in configured directories for RAG search.

directories.title: Index Directories
directories.description: List of directories to watch and index. Default: ['./knowledge']

poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval
poll_interval_seconds.description: How often to check for file changes. Default: 60 seconds

enabled.title: Enable Maintenance
enabled.description: Run scheduled maintenance tasks (memory optimization, self-reflection).

time.title: Maintenance Time
time.description: Time of day for maintenance run (HH:MM format). Default: 04:00

lifeboat_enabled.title: Enable Lifeboat
lifeboat_enabled.description: Allow hot-swapping updates via the lifeboat companion binary.
lifeboat_enabled.warning: ⚠️ Allows the agent to modify its own code!

memory.title: Memory Tools
memory.description: Enable core memory management (save, recall facts)

web_scraper.title: Web Scraper
web_scraper.description: Enable fetching and scraping web content
